root: ^As Valerie comes close to her house, she hears a faint voice coming from inside
^She takes a few steps toward the door and slightly opens it
^There, lying on the floor, Valentine is busy marketing one of the toys
^A girl is on top of him, firmly holding a leash while speaking with a firm tone
^See Val, I love your toys nearly as much as I love spending time with you, that's not the problem
^As she says these words, she pulls on the rope, making his body jolt forward
^And I have no doubt that your sister is doing her best, but when you assure me I'll get a same day delivery, I expect to see the package in my mailbox the same day
^How do you want me to educate my puppies if I can't keep them attached
^Indeed this is quite unfortunate, I'll be sure it'll be there tomorrow
^Great, I'm glad we are on the same page
^She lowers her body a bit, pecking Valentine on the nose, before getting back on her feet
^Pleasure doing business with you Val, I expect another meeting with you in a few days
^The girl throws on some clothes and exits the room, running a finger on Valerie's arm as she passes her by
^Valentine's now on his feet, putting his shirt back on before addressing Valerie
^Already back sis? Don't worry too much about deliveries, I know you're doing your best
^I'll go rest a bit, be sure to get some sleep in too
